use_cases: E-commerce product detail pages where users need to inspect images closely
Portfolio or gallery websites for viewing high-resolution images
Any application requiring zoomable image content with decorative branding elements
ai_summary: A stylized image zoom component featuring a Next.js Image with react-medium-image-zoom functionality. The component displays decorative yellow Plus icons in corners and a gradient text overlay with the displayed name. Designed for desktop and mobile platforms with responsive sizing, making it suitable for product showcases, portfolios, or any image-focused interface where zoom inspection is needed.
